decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already exists in registry as a fully matching canonical record (entity_name: MTA New York City Transit, entity_type: agency). The registry record already has this source in source_ids and entity_mta-nyct-2010-06-09 as an alias. No different target to link to — the observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.
